title: Age of Chaos
description: Unofficial Age of Chaos modpack with added performance improvements.
body:
# Age of Chaos Modpack

 

This modpack was specifically designed for the “Age of Chaos” server, which is currently offline.

 

## Features:

-Performance: Mods like Embendium boost FPS performance by approx. 2x

-Improved Overview: With Distant Horizons and Xaero’s World/Minimap, players can view the entire large map.

-Shaders: The Oculus mod allows you to play with shaders for enhanced visuals.

-Aircraft: The Immersive Aircraft mod enables fast travel across the map.

-Weapons: Timeless and Classics Zero offers high-quality weapons for intense battles

 

### Who is this modpack for?

This modpack is perfect for anyone looking to play Age of Chaos without much hassle.
